top_weaknesses.issue: Two long paragraphs read as walls on mobile: '这种节奏在底层技术按...' (~250-300 chars) and the '第一/第二/第三' political-reasons paragraph stacks all three points into one block
top_weaknesses.fix: Split historical analogies and capex into two paragraphs; break each '第一/第二/第三' point into its own paragraph

top_weaknesses.issue: Forced three-part symmetry ('原因有三' followed by '第一/第二/第三') reads as model-template / 智库简报体, breaking the sharp authorial voice
top_weaknesses.fix: Drop '原因有三' framing; rewrite as three short paragraphs with varied openers, or fold into prose

top_weaknesses.issue: H2 '结构性错位' and '一个匹配真实时钟的回应该是什么样' are abstract; weak for Chinese search queries (no '反垄断', 'AI 监管', '大模型监管' as anchors)
top_weaknesses.fix: Sharpen to e.g. '反垄断与 AI 速度的结构性错位' / 'AI 反垄断需要怎样的实时监管'

top_weaknesses.issue: '两个时钟，不在同一根轴上' reads slightly translated (英文 metaphor 直译); '约 35%' anchor text is data-only
top_weaknesses.fix: Consider '不是同一套时间尺度'; expand the 35% anchor to '入门级岗位招聘下降约 35% 的报道'

top_weaknesses.issue: Final policy bullet list flips from columnist judgment to think-tank memo, dilutes shareability of the close
top_weaknesses.fix: Compress bullets into one sharper paragraph or end on the existing strong final question

consensus_summary: 强中文稿，标题和论证有辨识度，赛博朋克段落是最强的分享钩子。主要问题是手机端两处长段、'原因有三' 的强行三段式、以及尾段政策清单略偏报告体。
